This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to promote digestive health and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Korthalsella include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
